{ "name": "sebastian/code-unit", "description": "Collection of value objects that represent the PHP code units", "type": "library", "homepage": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/code-unit", "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Sebastian Bergmann", "email": "sebastian@phpunit.de", "role": "lead" } ], "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/code-unit/issues", "security": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/code-unit/security/policy" }, "prefer-stable": true, "require": { "php": ">=8.2" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^11.5" }, "config": { "platform": { "php": "8.2.0" }, "optimize-autoloader": true, "sort-packages": true }, "autoload": { "classmap": [ "src/" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "classmap": [ "tests/_fixture" ], "files": [ "tests/_fixture/file_with_multiple_code_units.php", "tests/_fixture/function.php", "tests/_fixture/issue_9.php" ] }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "3.0-dev" } } }
